FixApplyTa.
    power< 'apply'
        trailer<
            '('
            arglist<
                (not argument<NAME '=' any>) func=any ','
                (not argument<NAME '=' any>) args=any [','
                (not argument<NAME '=' any>) kwds=any] [',']
            >
            ')'
        >
    >
